axexo.title: Engineering Lead
desc: Led the engineering team through a full fintech transformation — modernising the platform core, redefining architectural standards, and reshaping telecom-era products into financial services.

Designed end-to-end solution and software architecture for the product suite: SalesPortal (B2B sales portal, live in production), MBX (B2B mobile app), and the Axexo app featuring business verticals and an integrated wallet.

Architected crypto-powered financial inclusion: on-ramp/off-ramp flows enabling local currency ↔ stablecoin conversion (e.g. MXN → USDT) and an integrated wallet, extending banking access to underserved segments.
Established a multi-brand / multi-flavour architecture to scale the product across several brands from a shared codebase — owning code reviews and architectural standards definition.

seti.title: Solutions Architect
desc: Embedded Solutions Architect for Bancolombia within the Credit Cycle value stream (EVC), defining solution architectures across credit-domain bounded contexts for one of Colombia's largest financial institutions.
Collaborated with cross-functional squads to establish technical standards, integration blueprints, and architectural decision records governing the credit lifecycle platform.

emida.title: Software Developer
desc: Architected the migration from a Java/Vue monolith to event-driven microservices on AWS Lambda, ECS/EKS, and AuroraDB — enabling independent scaling per service and eliminating shared-database coupling.
Led the frontend rewrite from Vue to React + TypeScript, establishing component patterns and review standards the team adopted org-wide.
Designed REST and SOAP integration layers connecting internal systems to third-party payment services, deployed and operated on AWS API Gateway and ECS.

globant.title: Test Automation Engineer
desc: Built and maintained mobile test automation (Appium/Java) for the Disney Resort App, covering critical guest-facing booking flows integrated directly into the client CI pipeline.
Delivered web regression coverage (Selenium/Java) for ESPN and API contract tests (REST Assured/Java) for AutoDesk's backend — both shipped into client regression suites reducing manual test cycles.

unisys.title: Software & RPA Developer
desc: Automated high-volume back-office workflows using UiPath RPA, replacing manual processing cycles and cutting operational overhead.
Migrated a legacy EAE interface layer to Spring Boot + PostgreSQL, modernising the data access layer and significantly improving maintainability.
Delivered backend features and integrations for the CINCO information system across service and data layers.

gaira-tester.title: Functional Tester
desc: Owned the full test lifecycle for 5 government digital products (MinCiencias, MinTIC) across web and Android — from test plan authorship to stakeholder sign-off in controlled environments.
Authored test plans adopted as the quality baseline for project handoffs, enabling client teams to onboard with zero rework.

gaira-docs.title: Documentation Executive
desc: Bridged business stakeholders and engineering by translating requirements into wireframes (Adobe XD), reducing miscommunication-driven rework during development sprints.
Conducted AngularJS code reviews and managed production deployments to AWS EC2 + RDS, owning end-to-end release responsibility from review to go-live.
